2026-03-03PMOPublic Service Employment ActAppointment of the Associate Deputy Minister of Public Works and Government ServicesAppointment of Francis Trudel of Gatineau, Quebec, to be Associate Deputy Minister of Public Works and Government Services, to be styled Associate Deputy Minister of Public Services and Procurement, to hold office during pleasure, effective March 23, 2026.N/A
subject: Appointment of the Associate Deputy Minister of Public Works and Government Services
precis: Appointment of Francis Trudel of Gatineau, Quebec, to be Associate Deputy Minister of Public Works and Government Services, to be styled Associate Deputy Minister of Public Services and Procurement, to hold office during pleasure, effective March 23, 2026.
